settings.title: Admin Settings
settings.description: Manage admin security preferences and session access.

security.title: Security notice
security.desc: Admin access is separate from student accounts. Use a strong password and sign out when you finish platform management tasks.

language.title: Platform Language
language.desc: Select your preferred language for the admin dashboard interface.

session.title: Session
session.desc: End the current admin session and return to the separate admin login page.
